meta.title: Hargrove Wealth Advisory — Bespoke Wealth Management
meta.description: Independent, fee-only fiduciary financial advisors. Thoughtful wealth management for individuals, families, and institutions building long-term prosperity.

hero.headline: Your Wealth. Thoughtfully Managed.
hero.subheadline: Bespoke financial planning for individuals, families, and institutions seeking long-term prosperity.

servicesPreview.heading: Built around your life, not the market.
servicesPreview.lede: Three pillars of financial planning — designed to work together, not in isolation.

items.title: Wealth Management
items.description: Comprehensive planning that ties together investments, taxes, and your full financial picture.

items.title: Retirement Planning
items.description: Income mapping, Social Security strategy, and withdrawal plans built for 30+ year horizons.

items.title: Investment Strategy
items.description: Evidence-based portfolios, risk-aligned allocation, and disciplined quarterly review.

aboutTeaser.heading: A firm built on independence and discipline.
aboutTeaser.leadParagraph: We are independent, fee-only, and held to the fiduciary standard. We don't sell products. We don't earn commissions. We're paid by our clients to do one thing: act in their interest.
aboutTeaser.supportingParagraph: For more than twenty years we've helped families navigate the inflection points of their financial lives — career transitions, business sales, retirement, inheritance — with the same patient, evidence-based approach.

items.quote: After 30 years building my career, I needed someone who would think about my finances the way I thought about my company. Hargrove gave me that — clarity, discipline, and a real plan.
items.name: Margaret H.

items.quote: We came in with a complicated picture — two businesses, real estate, kids in college. They untangled it without judgment and built something that finally feels coordinated.
items.name: James & Priya Okafor

items.quote: I don't have time to manage this stuff and I shouldn't be the one doing it. They handle the heavy lifting and bring me into the decisions that actually matter.
items.name: David Chen

cta.heading: Ready to take control of your financial future?
cta.description: A conversation costs nothing. Clarity is the first step toward confidence.
